fn make_request(url: &str) -> Result<String, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let rt = tokio::runtime::Runtime::new()?;
    let response = rt.block_on(async {
        let resp = reqwest::get(url).await?;
        let body = resp.text().await?;
        Ok::<String, Box<dyn std::error::Error>>(body)
    })?;
    Ok(response)
}

fn fetch_user(id: u64) -> Result<User, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let rt = tokio::runtime::Runtime::new()?;
    let user = rt.block_on(async {
        let resp = reqwest::get(&format!("https://api.example.com/users/{}", id)).await?;
        let user: User = resp.json().await?;
        Ok::<User, Box<dyn std::error::Error>>(user)
    })?;
    Ok(user)
}

fn process_batch(urls: &[String]) -> Vec<String> {
    urls.iter()
        .map(|url| {
            let rt = tokio::runtime::Runtime::new().unwrap();
            rt.block_on(async {
                reqwest::get(url).await.unwrap().text().await.unwrap()
            })
        })
        .collect()
}

struct User { name: String }
